brand.name: Pain Relief Products / Healed by Farm
brand.vertical: Health & Wellness — DTC CBD / Natural Supplement
brand.tagline: Wellness in a Bottle — Get fast & easy pain relief delivered to your door

offer.what: Full-spectrum CBD tincture ('Wellness in a Bottle') — 163 mL jar, 3,300 mg CBD blended with organic extra-virgin olive oil. Also sells founder John Rankin's book 'Healed by Farm' (available on Amazon). No subscriptions or bundles currently.
offer.coreOutcome: Natural, drug-free relief from chronic pain, inflammation, and poor sleep — through a farm-sourced, additive-free CBD formula.
offer.pricePoint: $99.95 per bottle with free shipping. One-time purchase; no subscription option found.
offer.commitment: One-off purchase (no contract or recurring billing detected)
leadMagnets: Book: 'Healed by Farm' by John Rankin (educational content / brand authority builder)
Podcast featuring founder's ancestral nutrition and wellness philosophy
Blog content on farm-fresh nutrition and CBD benefits

audience.icp: Health-conscious adults (35–65+) dealing with chronic pain, joint discomfort, inflammation, or poor sleep who prefer natural, pharmaceutical-free solutions. Drawn to ancestral/farm-to-table wellness philosophies. Primarily US-based.
painPoints: Chronic joint or back pain limiting daily activity
Poor sleep quality due to pain or stress
Skepticism about prescription painkillers or side-effect concerns
Distrust of CBD market quality / hidden additives
Unsure if CBD actually works — need social proof
segments: Chronic pain sufferers (arthritis, back pain, joint discomfort)
Natural health advocates interested in ancestral nutrition
Wholesale / retail buyers (brand has a wholesale inquiry form)

salesCycle.length: Days to weeks — research-driven consideration; customer needs trust-building before a ~$100 one-time purchase
salesCycle.trial: No free trial. Book and podcast serve as soft entry points for top-of-funnel trust building.
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Self-serve add-to-cart on Shopify-style storefront. Social proof (testimonials) and FDA-compliant claims do the closing.
salesCycle.topObjection: Does it actually work? Is this quality CBD or another snake-oil product? (quality and efficacy skepticism is the #1 barrier in the CBD category)

ahaMoment: Noticeable reduction in pain or improvement in sleep quality within the first 1–2 weeks of consistent daily use of the tincture.

retention.recurring: No subscription model detected — revenue is transactional (repeat purchase only). High churn risk without a structured re-order flow.
retention.expansion: Potential upsell to larger quantities, bundles, or a future subscription/auto-ship. Book purchase is a secondary product. Wholesale partnership is a B2B expansion path.
retention.churnRisk: High — single SKU, no subscription, no loyalty program detected. Buyers who don't get immediate results or forget to reorder will churn silently.

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — almost certainly missing; new buyers need dosing guidance and expectation-setting to prevent early dropout
Lead-Magnet Nurture — podcast/book audience likely not funneled into email sequences
Value Newsletter — unknown; likely absent or ad hoc
Renewal / Re-order Nudge — critical gap given no subscription; ~30-day re-order window needs email trigger
Referral / Advocacy — missing; word-of-mouth is huge in CBD/wellness but not structured
toneVoice: Warm, plain-spoken, and grounded — rooted in John Rankin's personal health journey. Avoids medical jargon. Leans into farm authenticity, ancestral nutrition, and 'no chemicals' simplicity. Educational but approachable. Not hype-driven.
compliance: CBD / health supplement: FDA disclaimer required ('not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease'). Products contain <0.3% THC. Buyers responsible for local/state legal compliance. CAN-SPAM applies. No HIPAA exposure (no medical records). Avoid explicit disease-treatment claims in email copy.
